'''G3-5LE'''<ref name="G3-5LE">{{HasbroCite|set=Star Wars: Star Tours (toy line)|pack=G3-5LE|altlink=https://www.rebelscum.com/sw05g35le.asp}}</ref> was a [[Droid/Legends|droid]] that worked aboard the [[Star Tours/Legends|Star Tours]] travel agency's [[Tomorrowland Starport]]. It was seen near the [[Unidentified MSE droid series|MSE droid]] track plugging and unplugging a fuel tube, using a broken MSE unit as a table to rest it on.<ref name="Star Tours" />

==Behind the scenes==
G3-5LE was created for the [[1987]] [[The Walt Disney Company|Disney]] [[Wikipedia:Simulator ride|simulator ride]] [[Wikipedia:Amusement park|theme park]] attraction [[Star Tours (real-world)|''Star Tours'']], where it was featured in the ride's queue at [[Disney's Hollywood Studios]].<ref name="Star Tours" /> It was without a proper designation until an action figure of the droid designating G3-5LE was released in [[2005]] as part of the [[Wikipedia:Walt Disney Parks and Resorts|Disney Parks]] exclusive [[Star Wars: Star Tours (toy line)|''Star Wars: Star Tours'']] toy line.<ref name="G3-5LE" />
